transcript: Customer: Hi, this is Mark Henderson. I'm calling because my shutoff valve keeps running. Dispatcher: Hi Mark, I'm sorry to hear that. Can you tell me what brand it is? Customer: It's a Kohler, an older one, 15 years. Dispatcher: Okay, and what's the service address? Customer: 640 Willow Way. Dispatcher: Got it. We can send a technician out next Monday at 9. Does that work? Customer: Yes, that would be great. Thank you.

expected_entities.equipment: Kohler shutoff valve, an older one, 15 years
